title: myriophyllum humile f. capillaceum
intro: Myriophyllum humile f. capillaceum, also known as dwarf water-milfoil or water milfoil, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Haloragaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myriophyllum humile f. capillaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
